mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(ISNULL(m.MD002, ma.MA002),'') workCenter,TA001 single,TA002 singleNumber,TA003 singleDate, RTRIM(TA006) orderNum, TA034 orderName, TA035 specification,CAST(TA015 AS REAL) expectedOutput,TA010 expectedCompletion FROM MOCTA t LEFT JOIN CMSMD m ON t.TA021 = m.MD001 LEFT JOIN PURMA ma ON ma.MA001 = t.TA032 WHERE t.TA011 not in('Y','y') AND t.TA013='Y' AND t.TA010 < CONVERT(CHAR(8),GETDATE(),112) AND TA001 = #{single} AND TA002 = #{singleNumber} AND ISNULL(ISNULL(m.MD002, ma.MA002),'') = #{workCenter} ORDER BY t.TA009
SELECT * FROM MOCTA ORDER BY TA001
